inputs.label: Numerator 1
inputs.businessContext: Enter the numerator of the first fraction.

businessContext_i18n.en: Enter the numerator of the first fraction.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geben Sie den Zähler des ersten Bruchs ein.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Entrez le numérateur de la première fraction.

inputs.label: Denominator 1
inputs.businessContext: Enter the denominator of the first fraction. Must not be zero.

businessContext_i18n.en: Enter the denominator of the first fraction. Must not be zero.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Birinci kesrin paydasını girin. Sıfır olmamalıdır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geben Sie den Nenner des ersten Bruchs ein. Darf nicht Null sein.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Entrez le dénominateur de la première fraction. Ne doit pas être zéro.

inputs.label: Numerator 2
inputs.businessContext: Enter the numerator of the second fraction.

businessContext_i18n.en: Enter the numerator of the second fraction.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geben Sie den Zähler des zweiten Bruchs ein.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Entrez le numérateur de la deuxième fraction.

inputs.label: Denominator 2
inputs.businessContext: Enter the denominator of the second fraction. Must not be zero.

businessContext_i18n.en: Enter the denominator of the second fraction. Must not be zero.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İkinci kesrin paydasını girin. Sıfır olmamalıdır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geben Sie den Nenner des zweiten Bruchs ein. Darf nicht Null sein.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Entrez le dénominateur de la deuxième fraction. Ne doit pas être zéro.

inputs.label: Simplify Result
inputs.businessContext: Set to 1 to simplify the fraction to lowest terms, 0 to leave unsimplified.

businessContext_i18n.en: Set to 1 to simplify the fraction to lowest terms, 0 to leave unsimplified.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kesri en düşük terimlere sadeleştirmek için 1, sadeleştirmeden bırakmak için 0.
businessContext_i18n.de: Auf 1 setzen, um den Bruch auf die niedrigsten Terme zu kürzen, 0 für ungekürzt.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Mettre à 1 pour simplifier la fraction aux termes les plus bas, 0 pour laisser non simplifiée.

inputs.label: Decimal Precision
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for decimal representation (0 for integer).

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places for decimal representation (0 for integer).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ondalık gösterim için ondalık basamak sayısı (tamsayı için 0).
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Dezimalstellen für die Dezimaldarstellung (0 für ganze Zahl).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de décimales pour la représentation décimale (0 pour entier).

breakdown: ${error ? 'One denominator is zero, subtraction not possible.' : 'Step 1: Cross-multiply: ' + numerator1 + '/' + denominator1 + ' - ' + numerator2 + '/' + denominator2 + ' = (' + numerator1 + '×' + denominator2 + ' - ' + numerator2 + '×' + denominator1 + ') / (' + denominator1 + '×' + denominator2 + ')' }
${error ? '' : 'Step 2: Simplify intermediate: ' + num1 + '/' + commonDen + ' - ' + num2 + '/' + commonDen + ' = ' + resultNum + '/' + resultDen }
${error ? '' : (simplify ? 'Step 3: GCD = ' + gcd(resultNum, resultDen) + ', Simplified: ' + simpNum + '/' + simpDen : 'Step 3: Result (not simplified): ' + resultNum + '/' + resultDen) }
suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
